description_blurb:
The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) submitted a report of an unidentified anomalous phenomenon (UAP) to the All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office (AARO) consisting of a still image derived from a U.S. military system in 2025. The original imagery was altered with redactions before being submitted to AARO. An accompanying mission report was not provided. The operator reported that they were unable to positively identify the UAP. The date in the image is incorrect due to system date/time not being set.

Narrative Description: The monochrome image displays a grainy texture with a central crosshair reticle. A small, dark, circular object is visible in the upper right quadrant of the frame. The background shows an indistinct mountain range.This narrative description is provided for informational purposes only. Readers should not interpret any part of this description as reflecting an analytical judgment, investigative conclusion, or factual determination regarding the described event’s validity, nature, or significance.
title: FBI Photo B12
summary: The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) submitted a report of an unidentified anomalous phenomenon (UAP) to the All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office (AARO) in 2025, consisting of a still image derived from a U.S. military system. The original imagery was altered with redactions before being submitted to AARO, and an accompanying mission report was not provided. The operator reported that they were unable to positively identify the UAP. The monochrome image displays a grainy texture with a central crosshair reticle. A small, dark, circular object is visible in the upper right quadrant of the frame. The background shows an indistinct mountain range. The date in the image (12/31/99) is incorrect due to system date/time not being set.
reported_object_description: A small, dark, circular object is visible in the upper right quadrant of the frame.
official_resolution: The operator reported that they were unable to positively identify the UAP.
bust_reasoning: The bust_score is high because the document consists of a single, low-quality, grainy, black-and-white photograph. The object is described generically as 'small, dark, circular' with no described behavior or kinematics. There is no multi-sensor data or corroborating witnesses, placing this firmly in the category of easily misidentified or artifactual observations.
full_text:
# FBI Photo B12 - Page 1

**Document title:** FBI Photo B12
**Source file:** FBI Photo B12.pdf
**Page:** 1 of 1
**Agency:** FBI
**Release date:** 5/8/26
**Dataset description:** Incident date: Late 2025; Incident location: Western United States

***

[redacted]

[Image: A grainy, black-and-white surveillance-style photograph showing a landscape with a crosshair overlay. A small, dark, unidentified object is visible in the sky. There are multiple black redaction bars covering portions of the image.]

[redacted]
[redacted]
[redacted]
[redacted]
[redacted]
[redacted]

12/31/99 18:11:12
cover_up_reasoning: The cover-up score is substantial due to significant redactions. Multiple black redaction bars cover portions of the image itself, directly obscuring visual information. Additionally, '[redacted]' sections appear above and below the image, indicating withheld textual context.
summary_zh: 联邦调查局（FBI）于2025年向全域异常现象解决办公室（AARO）提交了一份关于未识别异常现象（UAP）的报告，其中包含一张源自美国军事系统的静止图像。原始图像在提交给AARO之前经过了编辑和遮盖，且未提供随附的任务报告。操作员报告称无法明确识别该UAP。该单色图像呈现颗粒感，并带有中央十字线分划板。画面右上象限可见一个小型、黑暗、圆形物体。背景显示模糊的山脉。图像中的日期（12/31/99）因系统日期/时间未设置而有误。
reported_object_description_zh: 画面右上象限可见一个小型、黑暗、圆形物体。
official_resolution_zh: 操作员报告称无法明确识别该UAP。
bust_reasoning_zh: 该事件的破绽评分较高，原因在于该文件仅包含一张单一的、低质量、颗粒感强的黑白照片。该物体被笼统地描述为“小型、黑暗、圆形”，未描述其行为或运动学特征。此外，缺乏多传感器数据或佐证目击者，这使其明确属于易于误识别或伪影观测的类别。
cover_up_reasoning_zh: 由于存在大量遮盖，该事件的掩盖评分较高。多条黑色遮盖条覆盖了图像本身的部分区域，直接遮蔽了视觉信息。此外，图像上方和下方出现了“[已遮盖]”部分，表明文本上下文被扣留。
claims: A UAP was captured in a still image from a U.S. military system.
The image was submitted by the FBI to AARO.
The original imagery was altered with redactions.
The operator was unable to positively identify the UAP.
The object is described as small, dark, and circular.
claims_zh: 一个UAP被美国军事系统捕获为静止图像。
该图像由联邦调查局提交给AARO。
原始图像经过了编辑和遮盖。
操作员无法明确识别该UAP。
该物体被描述为小型、黑暗、圆形。
bust_explanations: Lens flare or camera artifact: The grainy, black-and-white, surveillance-style nature of the photograph, combined with the generic description of a 'small, dark, circular object', makes a camera artifact or lens flare a highly plausible explanation.

Distant bird or insect: A small, dark, circular object could easily be a bird or insect flying close to the camera lens, appearing out of focus or as a silhouette against the sky, especially in a low-quality image.

Distant drone or balloon: Given the object's small size and lack of distinguishing features, it could be a distant consumer drone, weather balloon, or other small aerial craft that appears as a simple dark circle from afar.
bust_explanations_zh: 镜头光晕或相机伪影：该照片的颗粒感、黑白、监控风格的性质，加上对“小型、黑暗、圆形物体”的笼统描述，使得相机伪影或镜头光晕成为一个高度合理的解释。
远处的鸟类或昆虫：一个小型、黑暗、圆形物体很容易是飞近相机镜头的鸟类或昆虫，在低质量图像中可能显得失焦或呈现为天空背景下的剪影。
远处的无人机或气球：考虑到该物体体积小且缺乏显著特征，它可能是一个远处的消费级无人机、气象气球或其他小型飞行器，从远处看呈现为一个简单的黑点。
cover_up_indicators: multiple black redaction bars covering portions of the image
'[redacted]' sections above and below the image
cover_up_indicators_zh: 多条黑色遮盖条覆盖了图像的部分区域
图像上方和下方出现‘[已遮盖]’部分
